entities.name: NCT05822830
entities.context: SURMOUNT-5 (NCT05822830): Phase 3b study evaluating tirzepatide vs semaglutide in obesity/overweight without Type 2 Diabetes

attributes.descriptive_title: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) in Participants With Obesity or Overweight With Weight Related Comorbidities

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase 3b study evaluating efficacy and safety of tirzepatide compared with semaglutide

entities.name: Eli Lilly and Company
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Eli Lilly and Company

entities.name: tirzepatide
entities.context: Tirzepatide (LY3298176) administered SC QW, evaluated as experimental arm

entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: Semaglutide administered SC QW as active comparator arm

entities.name: 15 mg or MTD - Tirzepatide
entities.context: Experimental arm: tirzepatide starting at 2.5 mg SC QW, escalated up to 15 mg QW or MTD until Week 72

entities.name: 2.4 mg or MTD - Semaglutide
entities.context: Active comparator arm: semaglutide starting at 0.25 mg SC QW, escalated up to 2.4 mg QW or MTD until Week 72

entities.name: Arm A: tirzepatide 15 mg or MTD
entities.context: Experimental arm: tirzepatide dose escalation to 15 mg QW or MTD (10 mg or 15 mg) until Week 72

entities.name: Arm B: semaglutide 2.4 mg or MTD
entities.context: Active comparator arm: semaglutide dose escalation to 2.4 mg QW or MTD (1.7 mg or 2.4 mg) until Week 72

entities.name: Obesity
entities.context: Participants with obesity (BMI ≥30 kg/m²) or overweight with weight-related comorbidities without Type 2 Diabetes

entities.name: Overweight
entities.context: Participants with overweight (BMI ≥27 kg/m²) with at least one weight-related comorbidity

entities.name: percent change from baseline in body weight
entities.context: Primary endpoint: percent change from baseline in body weight at Week 72, assessed by ANCOVA model

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥10% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: percentage of participants who achieve ≥10% body weight reduction at Week 72

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥15% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: percentage of participants who achieve ≥15% body weight reduction at Week 72

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥20% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: percentage of participants who achieve ≥20% body weight reduction at Week 72

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥25% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: percentage of participants who achieve ≥25% body weight reduction at Week 72

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥30% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: percentage of participants who achieve ≥30% body weight reduction at Week 72

entities.name: change from baseline in waist circumference
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in waist circumference in centimeters at Week 72

entities.name: change from baseline in body mass index
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change from baseline in BMI at Week 72

entities.name: percent change from baseline in body weight comparing 15 mg tirzepatide and 2.4 mg semaglutide
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: percent change from baseline in body weight comparing 15 mg tirzepatide and 2.4 mg semaglutide at Week 72

entities.name: Adults with obesity or overweight and weight-related comorbidities without Type 2 Diabetes
entities.context: Adults ≥18 years with BMI ≥30 or ≥27 kg/m² with comorbidities (hypertension, dyslipidemia, OSA, CVD), no diabetes mellitus

attributes.comorbidities: hypertension, dyslipidemia, obstructive sleep apnea, cardiovascular disease

entities.name: BMI
entities.context: BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² required for enrollment; also used as secondary endpoint

attributes.use: Patient selection (inclusion criterion) and secondary endpoint

entities.name: prediabetes status
entities.context: Prediabetes status at randomization used as stratification variable in ANCOVA model for primary endpoint

relations.evidence: Phase 3b study evaluating efficacy and safety of tirzepatide compared with semaglutide
Lead Sponsor: Eli Lilly and Company
Experimental arm: tirzepatide (LY3298176) administered SC QW up to 15 mg
Experimental arm: tirzepatide dose escalation to 15 mg QW or MTD until Week 72
Active comparator arm: semaglutide administered SC QW up to 2.4 mg
Active comparator arm: semaglutide dose escalation to 2.4 mg QW or MTD until Week 72
Study evaluates tirzepatide vs semaglutide in participants with obesity or overweight
Study evaluates tirzepatide vs semaglutide in participants with obesity or overweight with weight-related comorbidities
Tirzepatide evaluated for treatment of obesity/overweight in SURMOUNT-5
Semaglutide evaluated as active comparator for treatment of obesity/overweight
Tirzepatide evaluated for treatment of overweight with comorbidities in SURMOUNT-5
Semaglutide evaluated as active comparator for overweight with comorbidities

relations.target_entity: Adults with obesity or overweight and weight-related comorbidities without Type 2 Diabetes
relations.evidence: Adults ≥18 years with BMI ≥30 or ≥27 kg/m² with comorbidities, no diabetes mellitus; n=751

relations.target_entity: Arm A: tirzepatide 15 mg or MTD
relations.evidence: Experimental arm: participants received tirzepatide dose escalation to 15 mg QW or MTD

relations.target_entity: Arm B: semaglutide 2.4 mg or MTD
relations.evidence: Active comparator arm: participants received semaglutide dose escalation to 2.4 mg QW or MTD
BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with comorbidity required for enrollment; BMI also used as stratification variable
Prediabetes status at randomization used as stratification variable in ANCOVA model for primary endpoint
Tirzepatide and semaglutide are compared in separate arms; not co-administered but both tested in the same trial
